productTitle: Ubiquiti Access Point Pro Arm Mount
name: Ubiquiti Access Point Pro Arm Mount
title: Ubiquiti Access Point Pro Arm Mount
short_description: Wall mount for an U6 Pro or AC Pro
description: The Ubiquiti Access Point Pro Arm Mount (UACC-Pro-AP-AM) is a dedicated wall-mounting accessory designed for U6 Pro and AC Pro access points. It provides a practical alternative to ceiling installation, making it ideal for environments where ceiling mounting is not possible, not preferred, or aesthetically unsuitable. This mounting arm allows the access point to be positioned securely on a wall while maintaining proper orientation for reliable wireless coverage. It is well suited for offices, corridors, classrooms, retail spaces, and other indoor areas where wall placement offers better signal distribution or easier cable routing. The mount is designed for simple and efficient installation, minimizing setup time and complexity. Its construction ensures stable positioning of the access point while maintaining a clean and professional appearance. By relocating the AP from the ceiling to the wall, installers gain greater flexibility in network design without compromising performance or visual consistency. The UACC-Pro-AP-AM is an ideal solution for professional deployments that require adaptability, ease of installation, and a reliable mounting method for Pro-series access points.

detailed_description.heading: Wall Mounting Accessory for U6 Pro and AC Pro
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Access Point Pro Arm Mount (UACC-Pro-AP-AM) is a dedicated wall-mounting accessory designed for U6 Pro and AC Pro access points. It provides a practical alternative to ceiling installation, making it ideal for environments where ceiling mounting is not possible, not preferred, or aesthetically unsuitable. This mounting arm allows the access point to be positioned securely on a wall while maintaining proper orientation for reliable wireless coverage. It is well suited for offices, corridors, classrooms, retail spaces, and other indoor areas where wall placement offers better signal distribution or easier cable routing. The mount is designed for simple and efficient installation, minimizing setup time and complexity. Its construction ensures stable positioning of the access point while maintaining a clean and professional appearance. By relocating the AP from the ceiling to the wall, installers gain greater flexibility in network design without compromising performance or visual consistency. The UACC-Pro-AP-AM is an ideal solution for professional deployments that require adaptability, ease of installation, and a reliable mounting method for Pro-series access points.

detailed_description.heading: Material and Compatibility
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Access Point Pro Arm Mount is compatible with U6 Pro and AC Pro access points. It is manufactured from durable polycarbonate, selected for its strength, impact resistance, and suitability for long-term indoor use. The mount has overall dimensions of 174 × 189 × 30 mm, providing a stable and well-balanced structure for wall-mounted installations. With a total weight of 136 g, it remains lightweight and easy to handle during installation while offering reliable support once mounted. Its robust construction ensures consistent performance in professional network environments, helping maintain proper access point positioning over time. The material choice and form factor make it suitable for both commercial and residential installations where durability and a clean appearance are required. Designed as a purpose-built accessory, the UACC-Pro-AP-AM integrates seamlessly with supported access points and supports consistent deployment standards across multiple installations.
